mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM project WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project (tenant_id, name, description, version, page_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{version}, #{pageCount}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
